headline_seed: The CFTC sued New York Friday over the state’s efforts to regulate online prediction markets, where people can make trades on the future outcomes of real world events like sports and elections. @jruss_jruss
draft_text: CFTC sued New York Friday over its efforts to regulate Kalshi and Coinbase prediction markets, claiming federal preemption. Gov. Hochul and AG James are named defendants. Courthouse News Service reports the case was filed in the Southern District of New York.
